---
title: "Powering a Knowledge-Driven Future"
description: "Slides from my invited talk at the WWW 2019 Workshop on Knowledge Graph Technology and Application."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-05-14"
categories: [knowledge graphs, conference, talk]
---

Slides of my invited talk @ WWW2019 Workshop on Knowledge Graph Technology and Application.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_powering-a-knowledge-driven-future-activity-6533949377067782144-Z8QG).*
